title: coryphopteris pauciloba
intro: Coryphopteris pauciloba, also known as a fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and digestive issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Coryphopteris pauciloba include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
